query_text: How long do employees have to submit travel expenses after a trip?
relevant_docs: ["Employees must submit travel expenses within 30 days of trip completion."]

query_text: Does a flight above 500 dollars need manager approval before booking?
relevant_docs: ["Flights above 500 dollars require manager approval before booking business travel."]

query_text: What approval and hotel reimbursement limits apply to business travel?
relevant_docs: ["Flights above 500 dollars require manager approval before booking business travel.","Hotel reimbursement is capped at 180 dollars per night unless finance approves an exception."]

query_text: How fast must urgent support tickets receive a first response?
relevant_docs: ["Urgent support tickets must receive a first response within 1 hour."]
